outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran's foreign minister leaves Pakistan, then Trump cancels U.S. delegation's travel
outlets.summary: Frames story as diplomatic fumble after Iran's FM exits before US team arrives. Araghchi onward to Muscat, Moscow. Trump pulls Witkoff/Kushner trip after Iran sent 'better but not enough' paper.

outlets.name: CBS News
outlets.headline: Trump canceled Kushner, Witkoff trip to Pakistan for U.S.-Iran talks
outlets.summary: Trump on Truth Social: 'I just cancelled the trip... we have all the cards, they have none.' Reverses Karoline Leavitt's Friday Fox News announcement. Marks 2nd Islamabad collapse.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Live Updates: Trump calls off Witkoff, Kushner's trip to Pakistan for US-Iran talks
outlets.summary: Emphasizes Trump's 'we have all the cards' leverage framing. Argues Iran's 'much better paper' arrived 10 minutes after cancellation — proof pressure works.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Pete Hegseth Declares Iran War 'Gift To The World' As Americans Get Pummeled At Pump
outlets.summary: Hegseth's 'gift to the world' Pentagon briefing juxtaposed with $4.03 gas prices. CSIS warns munitions depletion critical.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump cancels Witkoff and Kushner trip to Pakistan for talks
outlets.summary: Notes Iran rejected idea of direct talks; Araghchi onward to Muscat/Moscow. Frames cancellation as confirming Iranian denial that any Iran-US meeting was planned.

outlets.name: EU Council
outlets.headline: Costa: Strait of Hormuz must immediately reopen — 'vital for the entire world'
outlets.summary: European Council President at Cyprus informal summit demands Hormuz reopen 'without restrictions and without tolling.' EU position hardening; Kallas separately demands nuclear experts at any talks.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: PM instructs IDF to strike Hezbollah targets in Lebanon 'with force' after repeated truce violations
outlets.summary: Hezbollah fires 2 rockets and multiple drones at northern Israel — Manara, Margaliot, Misgav Am sirens. First rocket barrage since April 16 ceasefire. IDF strikes Radwan Force facilities; locates anti-tank cache.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu Orders IDF to Strike Lebanon 'With Force,' Targeting Hezbollah Despite U.S.-brokered Cease-fire
outlets.summary: Haaretz running tally: 15+ killed in Lebanon since April 16 ceasefire began. Netanyahu's office orders IDF 'vigorous strike' of Hezbollah after rocket/drone barrage. Truce deteriorating.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Israel dragged US into war against Iran, State Department confirms
outlets.summary: Cites State Dept legal adviser Reed Rubinstein's brief that the US 'is engaged in this conflict at the request of its Israeli ally.' Iranian framing: war is Israeli, not American, project.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Araghchi meets Pakistan's premier as he conveys Iran's views amid stalled talks with US
outlets.summary: FM Araghchi met PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir in Islamabad before continuing to Muscat and Moscow. Tehran frames trip as mediation, not direct US engagement. Trump's cancellation seen as confirmation.
